name: Create profile TIMING_APPLIED (non-stop ci=60 pi=1)
output:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_APPLIED test-duration non-stop computation-interval 60 probe-interval 1
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Commit profile
output:
commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 28-Jul-2025 06:41:04 UTC
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Configure source (MD-CUST/MA-CUST/mep 1)
output:
services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION source maintenance-domain MD-CUST maintenance-association MA-CUST mep-id 1
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Assign profile TIMING_APPLIED
output:
services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION profile TIMING_APPLIED
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Set target mep-id 2
output:
services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION target mep-id 2
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Enable admin-state
output:
services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION admin-state enable
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Commit DM session
output:
commit
ERROR: Source MD MD-CUST MA MA-CUST LMEP 1 in use with session DM_CFM_CLI.
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Session config shows TIMING_APPLIED
output:
show config services performance-monitoring cfm two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [28-Jul-2025 06:41:52 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    cfm
      two-way-delay-measurement DM_TIMING_SESSION
        admin-state enabled
        profile TIMING_APPLIED
        source maintenance-domain MD-CUST maintenance-association MA-CUST mep-id 1
        target mep-id 2
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
expected: Profile and source visible in config

output:
show services performance-monitoring cfm tests proactive two-way-delay session-name DM_TIMING_SESSION detail | no-more
